interactions.name: 进入校园
interactions.description: Enter or leave campus through a gate while checking plans.

en.name: Enter Campus
en.description: Enter or leave campus through a gate while checking plans.

zh.name: 进入校园
zh.description: 通过校门进出校园并确认行程。

interactions.name: 校门碰头
interactions.description: Meet someone at a campus gate before moving inward.

en.name: Gate Meetup
en.description: Meet someone at a campus gate before moving inward.

zh.name: 校门碰头
zh.description: 在校门与他人会合后再进入校园。

interactions.name: 校园导览
interactions.description: Guide visitors through landmark routes and share campus context.

en.name: Campus Tour
en.description: Guide visitors through landmark routes and share campus context.

zh.name: 校园导览
zh.description: 带领访客走过校园地标路线并介绍背景。

interactions.name: 湖边散步
interactions.description: Walk around Weiming Lake and hold a quiet conversation.

en.name: Lake Walk
en.description: Walk around Weiming Lake and hold a quiet conversation.

zh.name: 湖边散步
zh.description: 沿未名湖散步并安静交谈。

interactions.name: 户外思考
interactions.description: Pause outdoors to reflect, plan, or decompress.

en.name: Outdoor Reflection
en.description: Pause outdoors to reflect, plan, or decompress.

zh.name: 户外思考
zh.description: 在户外停下来思考、规划或放松。

interactions.name: 地标拍照
interactions.description: Take a landmark photo or describe what can be seen from the spot.

en.name: Landmark Photo
en.description: Take a landmark photo or describe what can be seen from the spot.

zh.name: 地标拍照
zh.description: 拍摄地标照片或描述当前位置所见。

interactions.name: 图书馆自习
interactions.description: Study quietly, read notes, or prepare for class.

en.name: Library Study
en.description: Study quietly, read notes, or prepare for class.

zh.name: 图书馆自习
zh.description: 安静自习、阅读笔记或准备课程。

interactions.name: 借还图书
interactions.description: Borrow, return, or search for a book.

en.name: Borrow or Return Books
en.description: Borrow, return, or search for a book.

zh.name: 借还图书
zh.description: 借书、还书或检索图书。

interactions.name: 科研讨论
interactions.description: Discuss papers, experiments, or a research question.

en.name: Research Discussion
en.description: Discuss papers, experiments, or a research question.

zh.name: 科研讨论
zh.description: 讨论论文、实验或科研问题。

interactions.name: 参加讲座
interactions.description: Attend a lecture, forum, or talk.

en.name: Attend Lecture
en.description: Attend a lecture, forum, or talk.

zh.name: 参加讲座
zh.description: 参加讲座、论坛或报告。

interactions.name: 公共报告
interactions.description: Give or listen to a public campus talk.

en.name: Public Talk
en.description: Give or listen to a public campus talk.

zh.name: 公共报告
zh.description: 发表或聆听校园公共报告。

interactions.name: 社团活动
interactions.description: Coordinate a student club event.

en.name: Club Event
en.description: Coordinate a student club event.

zh.name: 社团活动
zh.description: 协调学生社团活动。

interactions.name: 上课
interactions.description: Attend or teach a scheduled class.

en.name: Attend Class
en.description: Attend or teach a scheduled class.

zh.name: 上课
zh.description: 参加或讲授计划中的课程。

interactions.name: 答疑办公
interactions.description: Ask questions, tutor, or hold office hours.

en.name: Office Hours
en.description: Ask questions, tutor, or hold office hours.

zh.name: 答疑办公
zh.description: 答疑、辅导或开展办公时间。

interactions.name: 小组作业
interactions.description: Work with classmates on a group task.

en.name: Group Project
en.description: Work with classmates on a group task.

zh.name: 小组作业
zh.description: 与同学合作完成小组任务。

interactions.name: 宿舍休息
interactions.description: Rest, reset, or return to the dorm.

en.name: Dorm Rest
en.description: Rest, reset, or return to the dorm.

zh.name: 宿舍休息
zh.description: 在宿舍休息、调整或返回宿舍。

interactions.name: 宿舍聊天
interactions.description: Talk with roommates about daily campus life.

en.name: Roommate Chat
en.description: Talk with roommates about daily campus life.

zh.name: 宿舍聊天
zh.description: 和室友聊校园日常。

interactions.name: 准备出门
interactions.description: Pack books, check schedule, and prepare for the next activity.

en.name: Prepare to Leave
en.description: Pack books, check schedule, and prepare for the next activity.

zh.name: 准备出门
zh.description: 整理书本、查看日程并准备下一项活动。

interactions.name: 食堂用餐
interactions.description: Eat a meal in the student canteen.

en.name: Canteen Meal
en.description: Eat a meal in the student canteen.

zh.name: 食堂用餐
zh.description: 在学生食堂用餐。

interactions.name: 随意见面
interactions.description: Meet informally over food or a break.

en.name: Casual Meetup
en.description: Meet informally over food or a break.

zh.name: 随意见面
zh.description: 在用餐或休息时随意见面。

interactions.name: 交换消息
interactions.description: Share recent campus news or plans.

en.name: Share News
en.description: Share recent campus news or plans.

zh.name: 交换消息
zh.description: 交流近期校园消息或计划。

interactions.name: 运动锻炼
interactions.description: Exercise indoors or on nearby sports grounds.

en.name: Exercise
en.description: Exercise indoors or on nearby sports grounds.

zh.name: 运动锻炼
zh.description: 在室内或附近运动场锻炼。

interactions.name: 团队训练
interactions.description: Coordinate sports practice or a team routine.

en.name: Team Practice
en.description: Coordinate sports practice or a team routine.

zh.name: 团队训练
zh.description: 协调体育训练或团队练习。

interactions.name: 健康打卡
interactions.description: Check personal health and energy after exercise.

en.name: Wellness Check
en.description: Check personal health and energy after exercise.

zh.name: 健康打卡
zh.description: 运动后确认个人健康和精力状态。

interactions.name: 实验操作
interactions.description: Run a lab task or inspect experimental results.

en.name: Run Experiment
en.description: Run a lab task or inspect experimental results.

zh.name: 实验操作
zh.description: 执行实验任务或检查实验结果。

interactions.name: 实验安全检查
interactions.description: Check equipment, lab safety, or experiment setup.

en.name: Lab Safety Check
en.description: Check equipment, lab safety, or experiment setup.

zh.name: 实验安全检查
zh.description: 检查设备、实验安全或实验准备情况。

interactions.name: 院系会议
interactions.description: Attend an administrative or academic meeting.

en.name: Department Meeting
en.description: Attend an administrative or academic meeting.

zh.name: 院系会议
zh.description: 参加行政或学术会议。

interactions.name: 事务办理
interactions.description: Handle paperwork, permissions, or coordination tasks.

en.name: Paperwork
en.description: Handle paperwork, permissions, or coordination tasks.

zh.name: 事务办理
zh.description: 处理材料、权限或协调事务。
